fallback_contact.rationale: Phone 204-284-0358. Ellmar specializes in concrete & asphalt, excavation & grading, snow removal — civil/site-prep, NOT vertical building. They are a civil sub themselves, not a commercial GC. LOW FIT for Ashrah's commercial painting services. Recommend deprioritizing.

needs_review_flags: Ellmar is civil/sitework, NOT a vertical GC — likely no painting scope
Recommend removing from Ashrah's target list
If kept, only as a peer/referral relationship
personalization_hooks: Concrete/asphalt/excavation focus — peer subcontractor, not a buyer of paint

sources.claim: Services: concrete & asphalt, excavation & grading, snow removal
